text:
is a film that was released on 08 March 1998. It is a unification of the 1997 Neon Genesis Evangelion films DEATH(TRUE)² (largely the same as DEATH(TRUE), except with the re-addition of the image of Adam on Gendo's hand and several other minor edits) and The End of Evangelion. It is considered the final form of the Evangelion films, which were released in several forms prior to Revival. The two were released on the ninth and tenth discs of the Renewal of Evangelion box set with the labels of Revival of Evangelion and Evangelion - The Feature Film. It was exhibited at the Fushimi Million Theater in Nagoya on 24 June 2006. https://web.archive.org/web/20060613094044/http://www.evangelion.co.jp:80/
